content.en:
This time, there were a total of six Ten Realm-level masters who went to the Eternal Ruins.

Taichu Ancestor looked at everyone and said, "Everyone, let's go, although you all have maps, some places are still very dangerous, if I lead the way, it will be safer." "

"Then Lao Taichu Ancestor will lead the way!"

Ten Elements of Ancestral Path.

"Let's go!"

One by one, everyone shuttled away.

The speed of these Ten Realm-level Masters of the Black Decay Masters is very slow, and it is impossible for the Primal Ancestor to shuttle at the speed of the Black Decay Controllers, so how many years will it take to reach the Ruins of Eternity!

"Black decay, don't resist, the teacher will take you through!"

Ten Elements of Ancestral Path.

"Thank you, Master!"

The Black Decay Controller hurriedly said.

"Ye Tian, what about you, can you keep up?" asked the Ten Elements Ancestor.

Although he knew that Ye Tian's combat power was very strong, not much weaker than him, but the rush was not the same as the strength, and the speed of the half-step perfect controller was very fast, far from being comparable to the Ten Realm-level controllers.

"Master, don't worry, I can keep up!"

Ye Tian said.

In an instant, Ye Tian cast an instantaneous shadow and easily followed the Ten Elements Ancestors and their half-step perfect controllers.

"Perfect Mastery!"

The Primal Ancestor looked at Ye Tian who was constantly shuttling in surprise, almost keeping up with the speed of these half-step perfect controllers, and without the help of any half-step perfect controllers.

You must know that they have crossed an incomparably long distance in every instant, and the Ten Realm-level controllers simply can't keep up with their speed.

And Ye Tian was able to keep up with their speed with the help of a perfect control technique.

A perfect control technique for rushing is nothing, the Primal Ancestor has seen a lot, so he is not surprised, but with the help of the perfect control technique, a Ten Realm-level master has a speed comparable to theirs, which is terrifying.

"This Ten Realms level controller is not simple!"

The Primal Ancestor said secretly.

And the Black Decay Controller was also extremely shocked, the speed of the little junior brother Ye Tian was so fast, he could keep up with the speed of the master!

"How strong is the little junior brother now?"

The Black Rotten Ruler was extremely curious.

Shuttle!

Shuttle!

Shuttle!

The speed of the crowd was incomparably fast, crossing one area after another at the end of the realm.

After about six million realm river years, he finally came to the closest space-time void to the Origin Realm Sea.

"Entering this void gap in time and space, you will be under tremendous pressure, without the strength of the Ten Realms level controller, it is unbearable, you must have the support of a half-step perfect controller before you can pass!"

The Primal Ancestor explained.

Void in time and space!

It was also the first time Ye Tian had seen the space-time void, after all, he had never come to such a distant region before.

After all, at his current speed, he has traveled through six million realm river years, what kind of concept is this!

At the beginning, the place where he was allowed to obtain the golden fruit, at his current speed, would have been done in a few hundred years.

As a result, this place could no longer be measured by distance from the Origin Realm Sea, it was too far away, and it was an area that ordinary Ten Realm-level masters would almost never be able to reach.

"Let's all enter the space-time void crack, the places that the space-time void gap can pass through are fixed, through this space-time void gap, we will save endless years of rush time. "

Taichu Ancestor Dao.

Immediately, everyone instantly stepped into the void of time and space.

Rumble!!!

Endless pressure hit, and the faces of the Black Decay Controllers changed slightly, obviously the pressure here made them very uncomfortable.

But the Ten Elements Ancestors were very indifferent, as if they were ignoring the pressure here.

And Ye Tian was the same, completely ignoring the pressure here.

Time passed slowly, and it took 100,000 years to travel through the gap in time and space before it came out of another gap in time and space.

"Let's go, let's move on, we need to rush to another space-time void, although we will take a detour a little, but with the space-time void, we can save infinite years of time. "The Primal Ancestor said.

In this way, the Primal Ancestor led everyone to constantly shuttle through the end of the realm.

And this place is too far away from the Origin Realm Sea, even if the Ten Realm-level controllers leave their incarnations in the Origin Realm Sea, the avatars there will collapse and cannot be maintained at all.

And Ye Tian's induction with the body still exists, although the knowledge is far away, but the replication talent after promotion is extremely powerful, so it can connect the connection between the body and the copy body, but the information transmission will take some time.

Before I knew it, 100 million years had passed.

this day.

They came to an area, and the Primal Ancestor stopped and did not continue to shuttle.

"Attention, everyone, it's dangerous here!"

Taichu Ancestor Dao.

"It's dangerous, can you get around?" asked the Ten Elements Ancestor.

"No, I can't. Taichu Ancestor said: "Here is a space-time void gap surrounded, and here is a large space-time void crack, if you pass from here, you can save 100 trillion realm river years, it can be said that it is the most important space-time void gap from the Origin Realm Sea to the Eternal Ruins, if you go around, you have to slowly shuttle to another space-time void gap, it will take 100 trillion realm river years, are you willing to spend more time?"

A trillion world river years?

Not to mention that they are unwilling to be the Black Decay Masters, and the Ten Elements Ancestors don't want to spend these more trillion realm river years, who knows if there will be any danger in the middle?

If they encounter a terrifying creature that rivals the perfect controller, they will be wiped out.

"Primal Ancestor, what's the danger here?"

Primordial Ancestor asked.

"This is the territory of a special realm river creature, called the Void Snake, this special creature is very powerful, among them there are three Void Snakes comparable to a half-step perfect controller, when I rushed over before, I rushed over directly and did not conflict with them, but this time you brought a few Ten Realm level controllers, you must protect their safety. The Void Snake has a Void Eye, which can directly kill the will of the Ten Realm-level masters, and if it is weak, it will be killed in one move. The Primal Ancestor reminded.

As soon as they heard this, the faces of the Black Decay Controllers changed.

"Let's protect them with our will, let's rush straight over!"

Ten Elements of Ancestral Path.

"Good!"

The Primordial Ancestor nodded.

After all, he also brought his son with him this time, and naturally he didn't want his son to have an accident.

Therefore, he blessed the body of the Primordial Controller with his willpower, ensuring that the Primordial Controller would not be killed by the Void Eye.

"Rush!"

The Primordial Ancestor led everyone into the territory of the Serpent of Illusion.

At this moment, in the depths of endless time and space, a series of delusional snakes came out, each with gray eyes.

When they saw the Primal Ancestor and the others, they directly launched an attack.
